gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق أو حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/306)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق أو حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/306)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) اتَّقُوا الْكَلَامَ عِنْدَ مُلْتَقَى الْخِتَانَيْنِ فَإِنَّهُ يُورِثُ الْخَرَسَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Qasim, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Beware of the speaking during the meeting of the two private parts, for it inherits the dumbness’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from a man from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “About the case of a man who looks at his wife when she is nude, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not unlawful. Pleasure is but in such things.’”
